input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.8
            TITLE: non-metallic belt drive - scatter shields for belts must:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.8: Non-metallic Belt Drive - Scatter shields for belts must:
T.5.2.8 Non-metallic Belt Drive - Scatter shields for belts must: 
a. Be made from 3.0 mm minimum thickness aluminum alloy 6061-T6 
b. Have a minimum width that is equal to 1.7 times the width of the belt.    
c. Be centered on the center line of the belt  
d. Stay aligned with the belt under all conditions

final_answer: rule T.5.2.8: Non-metallic Belt Drive - Scatter shields for belts must: T.5.2.8 Non-metallic Belt Drive - Scatter shields for belts must: a. Be made from 3.0 mm minimum thickness aluminum alloy 6061-T6 b. Have a minimum width that is equal to 1.7 times the width of the belt. c. Be centered on the center line of the belt d. Stay aligned with the belt under all conditions
